steps.title: Use square-root symmetry
steps.content:
The equation is
$$x^2=2{,}704$$
Because $2{,}704$ is positive, the equation has one positive real solution and one negative real solution.

steps.title: Count the real solutions
steps.content:
Since
$$52^2=2{,}704$$
the solutions are $x=52$ and $x=-52$. There are exactly two real solutions. The answer is C.
